title: fix(deps): update module github.com/google/uuid to v1.3.1

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>google/uuid (github.com/google/uuid)</summary>

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/google/uuid/compare/v1.3.0...v1.3.1)

##### Bug Fixes

-   Use .EqualFold() to parse urn prefixed UUIDs ([#​118](https://togithub.com/google/uuid/issues/118)) ([574e687](https://togithub.com/google/uuid/commit/574e6874943741fb99d41764c705173ada5293f0))
